source_pr.title: loaddata: support concurrent writing to TiKV
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #40499

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

a simple test shows concurrent writing improves the performance indeed. tiup playground, 1G data, 4 indexes
- LOAD DATA thread = 1: **9min 28s**
- lightning default thread = #CPU core: **6min 0s**
- LOAD DATA thread = #CPU core: **4min 52s**

however, during the lightning test my OS is very slow, I will deploy a cluster to test it later.

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: turn on race.
analysis:
PR title: loaddata: support concurrent writing to TiKV
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/42667
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: turn on race
Changed files (5): executor/importer/BUILD.bazel, executor/importer/import.go, executor/importer/import_test.go, executor/load_data.go, executor/loadremotetest/multi_file_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
